items.title: [codex] Add foundation next-wave validation manifest
items.why_not_merged: The required Build and Test job is queued on GitHub Actions. All other reported checks are green, and the repository does not allow auto-merge.
items.next_action: Merge after Build and Test completes successfully; inspect the Actions log and fix the branch if the queued job fails.

recently_resolved.title: [codex] Link scenario report blockers to GitHub issues
recently_resolved.follow_up: All 320 scenario pages now carry issue-backed blockers; the rollup currently exposes 1,369 open issue links, including 85 blocker links and 1,284 major links.

recently_resolved.title: Deepen scenario page launch report template
recently_resolved.follow_up: The generated scenario pages now expose launch readiness, missing-evidence placeholders, and skill-grounded UI/UX review structure for all 320 scenarios.

recently_resolved.title: Normalize provider cassette scenario refs
recently_resolved.follow_up: Provider cassettes now map to 11 generated scenario pages with 0 unmapped refs in the report.

recently_resolved.title: Add Chirp/NMP regression validation catalog
recently_resolved.follow_up: The Chirp/NMP validation pack expanded the live catalog to 320 generated scenario pages.

recently_resolved.title: Stabilize auto-download settings controls
recently_resolved.follow_up: QD-011 remains pending revalidation with fresh screenshots, metrics, logs, and UI tree evidence.

recently_resolved.title: [codex] Deepen scenario report page generator
recently_resolved.follow_up: The generated report has per-scenario pages and required UI/UX/performance/cohesion sections.
